calendar.matters:
Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Gloria Alderman.

Mr. Park stated that discovery had been conducted and that it was appropriate to dismiss the matter. The Order Dismissing Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust With Prejudice was signed in open court.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Continued To May-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Corey appeared by telephone for Marie Ferretti. Arthur Park for Gloria Alderman.

Mr. Corey suggested setting the matter for a status report in 60 days. Mr. Park concurred. The Court signed an order referring the matter to pro bono mediation which is to be completed by May 26, 2009. The matter was continued to May 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Gloria Alderman. Ed Corey by telephone for Marie Ferretti.

Mr. Park stated that discovery needed to be conducted and suggested putting the matter out so that the parties could attempt an early settlement. Mr. Corey concurred with Mr. Park and stated that he needed to take depositions. The Court continued the matter to March 24, 2009 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery. Mr. Corey will appear by court call. A joint written status report on discovery is to be submitted by March 20, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
